message:
refactor: clippy lints, idiomatic Rust patterns, and doc-comment fixes

Assorted code quality improvements across multiple connectors:

IRC (client.rs, session.rs):
- Replace if-let/else chains with .map_or() / .map_or_else()
- Replace .map_or(false, ...) with .is_some_and(...)
- Use .clone_from() instead of .clone() assignment to avoid alloc
- Remove verbose section-header comments
- Make trivial getters const fn
- Combine match arms for Ok(None) | Err(UpstreamTimeout)
- Fix doc-comment backtick escaping for RPL_WELCOME

Nostr (client.rs, types.rs):
- Replace match-with-early-return with let-else pattern
- Make EncryptedDmEvent::new() const fn

Google Places (types.rs):
- Add Eq derive to 8 structs that already impl PartialEq on Eq types

Mattermost (connector.rs, main.rs):
- Remove async from handle_simulate() — it does no I/O

Doc-comment lint fixes:
- Wrap identifiers in backticks: BlueBubbles, ElevenLabs, OpenRouter,
  ZaloUser

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -87,7 +87,7 @@ async fn handle_message(connector: &mut MattermostConnector, message: &str) -> s
         "doctor" => connector.handle_doctor().await,
         "self_check" => connector.handle_self_check().await,
         "introspect" => connector.handle_introspect(),
-        "simulate" => connector.handle_simulate(params).await,
+        "simulate" => connector.handle_simulate(params),
         "subscribe" => connector.handle_subscribe(params).await,
         "invoke" => connector.handle_invoke(params).await,
         "shutdown" => connector.handle_shutdown(params).await,
